## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `npx claude-channel-setup` (or `claude-channel-setup` for Python)
2. Select channel: Discord / Telegram
3. ...

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens. Include error messages if any.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 15.3, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11]
- Node.js version (if using npm): [e.g., 22.0.0]
- Python version (if using pip): [e.g., 3.13.0]
- Claude Code version: [e.g., 2.1.80]
- Bun version: [e.g., 1.2.0]

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or logs.
